nasb.text: then you shall drive out all the inhabitants of the land from before you, and destroy all their figured stones, and destroy all their molten images and demolish all their high places;

esv.text: then you shall drive out all the inhabitants of the land from before you and destroy all their figured stones and destroy all their metal images and demolish all their high places.

cnv.text: 就要把所有的居民從你們面前趕出去，毀壞他們的一切雕像，以及一切鑄像，又拆毀他們的一切邱壇。

ccb.text: 一定要赶走当地的居民，毁掉他们一切的石像和铸像，拆毁他们所有的丘坛。
